facebook.caption: Tourists keep walking past this place. Locals at Blue seafood restaurant (블루씨푸드) on Đường Nguyễn Trãi are just fine with that. 4.7 stars across 1,000 reviews and it still flies under the radar. Fresh seafood, real Phu Quoc pricing, zero resort markup. This is the kind of spot you stumble onto and immediately stop telling people about. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
